contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 90
- Description: Outbound Review draft cleanup + LLM hand-off URL convention
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/228
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/229
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/118
  
  Details:
  Manager Follow-up draft pipeline diagnostic, cleanup, and Outbound Review LLM hand-off
  
  Cluster of work to close the loop between draft generation and human review on the
  Outbound Review page, and to remove future friction when handing a problematic
  draft to an LLM CLI.
  
  Hit List + cadence diagnostic:
  
  1. Pulled fresh Hit List snapshot (668 rows). Filtered the 24 'Manager Follow-up'
     rows with email present. Initial "0 sends" reading from Email Agent Follow Up
     was wrong (query bug); corrected per-store cadence shows 20 ELIGIBLE / 1
     OVERDUE / 3 WAIT (Elliott's 6d, Good Vibrations 4d, Untamed Fire 5d).
  
  2. Flipped 3 'Shortlisted' rows to 'AI: Enrich — manual' (Salud al Natural,
     Sun&Moon, Ventura Ranch Market) — they had been Shortlisted Nov 2025 with
     phone-only and no follow-up; they're cold rows, not closure-ready leads.
  
  3. Confirmed Gary had deleted all 23 prior Gmail drafts. Ran
     sync_email_agent_followup.py then suggest_manager_followup_drafts.py --use-grok
     (full Gmail thread + DApp Remarks + Hit List Notes per recipient) to
     regenerate 21 context-aware drafts in mailbox garyjob@agroverse.shop. Good
     Vibrations was correctly skipped by cadence gate; Elliott's (6d) and Untamed
     Fire (5d) slipped past --min-days-since-sent=7 (off-by-one in cadence
     comparison — flagged as follow-up). Manually deleted those two Gmail drafts
     and marked Email Agent Drafts rows as 'discarded'.
  
  Outbound Review LLM hand-off:
  
  4. TrueSightDAO/dapp#228 — warmup_review.html: shop name header inside each
     expanded <details> panel (preview / full body / original reply) so the
     shop context never scrolls off-screen during long-thread review.
  
  5. TrueSightDAO/dapp#229 — warmup_review.html: URL hash now carries the focused
     draft id (#followup/d-r4632...). Hash auto-updates when any <details>
     opens; on initial load the referenced card auto-expands, scrolls into view,
     and shows a yellow ring. Lets Gary copy the browser URL straight to an LLM
     CLI when a draft needs to be redone — no "Copy URL" button needed.
  
  6. TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context#118 — PARTNER_OUTREACH_PROTOCOL.md §12:
     documents the URL convention and what an LLM CLI should do when given such
     a URL — 7-step resolution recipe across Email Agent Drafts, Gmail draft,
     Email Agent Follow Up, Hit List, DApp Remarks, plus the common-complaint
     patterns to diagnose and the regenerate-via-Grok recipe. Removes the need
     to re-teach the flow each session.
  
  Net: 21 fresh, context-aware drafts sitting in Gmail for review; per-store
  cadence honored; the bottleneck is now firmly the human review+send step; and
  future LLM sessions can resolve any single-draft complaint from a URL alone.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 150.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
--------

My Digital Signature: 

Request Transaction ID:

Verify submission here: https://dapp.truesight.me/verify_request.html
rubric: 100TDG For every 1 hour of human effort
